mnemonics.title: Core OS Functions
mnemonics.content: **P**lease **M**ake **F**rench **D**onuts - for Process, Memory, File, and Device Management.

mnemonics.content: **U**ser **P**lease **I**dle **F**or **C**ommunications **E**very **R**esource **A**ccounting **P**eriod - for User Interface, Program Execution, I/O Ops, File Sys Ops, Communications, Error Detection, Resource Allocation, Accounting, Protection.
